note_text: Wound note - Lefthip. Meas 5.8x2.2x0.9cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 44% gran, 56% slough. Periwound erythematous. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Bergstrom notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left hip wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 3 pressure ulcer Left hip measures 5.8 cm x 2.2 cm x 0.9 cm.
  Wound bed: 42% slough, 58% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Stage 3 pressure ulcer Left hip — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Physician notified of wound progression.
